    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[OrderItemId]

    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]

    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'

    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id1], [m].[ArabicName], [m].[AttributeId], [m].[AttributePrice], [m].[BackColor], [m].[Barcode], [m].[BranchId], [m].[CategoryId] AS [CategoryId0], [m].[CreationDate], [m].[Description], [m].[EnglishName], [m].[FifthPrice], [m].[FourthPrice], [m].[HasAttribute], [m].[ImagePath], [m].[Invisible], [m].[KitchenTypeId], [m].[MainCategoryId], [m].[NormalizedEnglishName], [m].[Price], [m].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [m].[SecondPrice], [m].[Tax], [m].[TextColor], [m].[TextSize], [m].[ThirdPrice], [m].[UpdatedDate]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[OrderItemId]

        FROM [AspNetRoleClaims] AS [a]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END
